content:
🚀 openclaw-android | Java
🎯 Primary Use Case: Enabling users to run OpenClaw and other Linux binaries on Android devices with minimal resource consumption and simplified setup.
✨ Key Features: • Run OpenClaw on Android without proot-distro • Minimal storage overhead (~200MB) • Fast setup time (3-10 minutes) • Native performance • Standalone Android app with integrated UI and terminal
📖 Summary: OpenClaw on Android allows users to run OpenClaw, a powerful tool, directly on their Android devices without the need for a full Linux distribution like proot-distro. It achieves this by installing only the necessary glibc dynamic linker, significantly reducing storage overhead and setup time while offering native performance.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
